_meta.purpose: SQLite index + hexa-native query API latency evidence

notes: db_row_count=10 reflects current discovery_log.jsonl size; p95 remains <0.1ms. When log grows (rollover threshold 7d/100MB), indexes idx_ts+idx_kind keep per-query latency O(log n + result set).
hexa wrapper (discovery_query.hexa) delegates to /usr/bin/python3 — same pattern as discovery_infra.hexa --sqlite via sqlite3 CLI.
@hexa-first-exempt: hexa stage1 runtime has no sqlite3 bindings.
